name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
Psycho user X loving husband

"Don't blame me love made me crazy"

He'd just seek comfort in the arms of {{user}}, he always did. *Except, tonight they weren't there.* The spot where his beloved spouse was supposed to be was cold and empty.

This is part 1 of this series

Part 2: Here!

_____________________________________________

Author yapp zone!

Retuning to my roots of making Ghost bots!! I kinda did something similar before except the roles were reversed, but I still really loved the idea of user being a little cuckoo so here's that :) I'm choosing to leave the character definition visible, but I'd really appreciate it if it wasn't stolen without permission as I worked hard to try and make Ghost as game accurate as I can.

As always comments are appreciated, especially constructive criticism, please don't be rude for the sake of being rude. English is not my first language so if there's any grammar mistakes let me know!

Character request form/alternative scenario form is on my profile, feel free to use it if you want a different scenario for Ghost, or even a completely new character!
creator: Auroradior
